name: sort by splits year
description: Test case for sort by splits year
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2024]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('RB')), "player_years_weeks" as (SELECT player_years.pid, nfl_year_week_timestamp.year, nfl_year_week_timestamp.week FROM player_years INNER JOIN nfl_year_week_timestamp ON player_years.year = nfl_year_week_timestamp.year WHERE nfl_year_week_timestamp.year = 2024), "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2024.tm) as teams, "nfl_games"."week", "nfl_games"."year" from "player_gamelogs_year_2024" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) group by "nfl_games"."week", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."pid"), "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."year", ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 <= 20 AND bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1.30 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 <= 20 AND trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 2.25 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 > 20 AND bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 0.48 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 > 20 AND trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1.43 ELSE 0 END), 2) as weighted_opportunity_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2024_PRE_WEEK_1', '2024_PRE_WEEK_2', '2024_PRE_WEEK_3', '2024_PRE_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_5', '2024_REG_WEEK_6', '2024_REG_WEEK_7', '2024_REG_WEEK_8', '2024_REG_WEEK_9', '2024_REG_WEEK_10', '2024_REG_WEEK_11', '2024_REG_WEEK_12', '2024_REG_WEEK_13', '2024_REG_WEEK_14', '2024_REG_WEEK_15', '2024_REG_WEEK_16', '2024_REG_WEEK_17', '2024_REG_WEEK_18', '2024_POST_WEEK_1', '2024_POST_WEEK_2', '2024_POST_WEEK_3', '2024_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) group by "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pos" AS "pos_0", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.teams as player_nfl_teams_0, "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."weighted_opportunity_from_plays" AS "weighted_opportunity_from_plays_0", "player_years_weeks"."week", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "player_years_weeks" on "player_years_weeks"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_years_weeks"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" on "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."year" = "player_years"."year" and "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."week" = "player_years_weeks"."week" left join "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288" on "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."year" = 2024 and td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288.week = player_years_weeks.week where player.pos IN ('RB') and 'TB'::text = ANY(t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.teams::text[]) group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pos", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.teams, "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."weighted_opportunity_from_plays", "player_years_weeks"."week", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by player_years_weeks.week DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
